content:
# Session 15 (iter-015) ÔÇö review summary

## Metadata
- Lanes: FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean` (prove), SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean` (fine-grained). Model: opus.
- Sorry-decls: **FBC 5Ôćĺ5** (main `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` ELIMINATED, new bridge added ÔÇö net 0);
  **SNAP 5Ôćĺ6** (new helper `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head`, 0 eliminated).
- **Both files cold-build GREEN** (review-verified): FBC 8318 jobs, SNAP 2441 jobs, **0 errors, 0 kernel
  timeouts**. NO iter-013-style regression ÔÇö the FBC lane crashed (MCP closed) but AFTER safely reverting
  the bridge to `sorry`.
- 0 new axioms. blueprint-doctor: 0 findings. sync_leanok (sha 947f908): SNAP Ôłĺ31 / +0 (deterministic;
  honest ÔÇö the hK_lhs decomposition un-marked the transitively-sorry SNAP upper cone).

## FBC ÔÇö HEADLINE: the kernel bomb is DEFEATED; foundation collapsed to one small bridge sorry
The morphism-level route (`analogies/fbc-morphism-comp.md`) **worked**. `gammaPushforwardIso_comp`
(L763) is now a complete, cold-build-green proof:
```
rw [gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge]
apply ModuleCat.hom_ext; refine LinearMap.ext fun x => ?_
have htail : ÔłÇ y, (ÔÇŽ╬│_¤ć Ôëź (restr ¤ć).map ╬│_¤ü Ôëź restrictScalarsComp.invÔÇŽ) y = y := fun y => rfl
rw [gammaPushforwardIso_hom_apply, ModuleCat.comp_apply]
refine Eq.trans ?_ (htail _).symm
rw [moduleCat_eqToHom_concreteCategory_apply]; exact (eq_of_heq (cast_heq _ x)).symm
```
The iter-011..014 kernel bomb was the RHS composite reduction distributing the value-`ModuleCat`/`X.Modules`
junction. The morphism-level route crosses the junction **exactly once** (the new bridge), and the tail
`htail` is a **single kernel-light rfl** that never touches the `¤ćÔëź¤ü` junction ÔÇö so it does NOT bomb. The
residual endpoint mismatch is pure `cast_heq` (proof-irrelevance), with **no ring content invoked** at this
level (it is absorbed defeq inside the per-map `gammaPushforwardIso`s).

**Sole remaining FBC foundation sorry = the new bridge `gammaPushforwardIso_comp_bridge` (L741).** Its body
`rw [Functor.map_comp, eqToIso.hom, eqToHom_app, eqToHom_map]` reduces (kernel-safe) to the single goal
`eqToHom Ôő» Ôëź moduleSpec╬ôFunctor.map ((pushforwardComp ¤ü ¤ć).inv.app N) = eqToHom Ôő»`. Closing needs
`(pushforwardComp ÔÇŽ).inv.app N = ­ŁčÖ`, but every route tried (`congr 1`; `rw [show ÔÇŽ = ­ŁčÖ _ from rfl]; rfl`)
whnf-reduces `pushforwardComp` (= `Iso.refl` underneath) across the junction Ôćĺ **kernel timeout** (LSP-clean,
cold-build-bomb ÔÇö the documented hazard). Fix for iter-016: close it WITHOUT whnf via `SheafOfModules.Hom.ext`
+ the per-open identity `pushforwardComp_inv_app_app` (so the iso is never reduced as a whole).

## SNAP ÔÇö hK_lhs stalled at the ╬╝-syntactic-identity wall (0 eliminated)
Mechanized **Step 0** (`show`-uniform) + **Step 1a** (`rw [ÔćÉ Localization.Monoidal.tensorHom_id]`), both
GREEN. **Step 1b** (the interchange MERGE to expose `((c_AÔŐŚc_B)ÔŐŚc_C) Ôëź ╬▒` for `associator_naturality`) is
the **WALL**: plain `rw [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]`/`ÔćÉ tensor_comp` Ôćĺ pattern-not-found (reducible
transparency only); `conv`/`erw` Ôćĺ whnf deterministic timeout at the `c_{AÔŐŚB} Ôëź ╬╝.inv` composite-object
junction. `associator_naturality`/`associator_hom_app` cold-probed **NO-MATCH** on `╬▒_ A B C`.

The prover extracted recipe **Step 5** (head reduction) as a NEW helper `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head`
(L1890) and **reduced the entire head to a SINGLE ╬╝-pair cancel** (`cancel_epi` + keystone
`sheafification_whiskerRight_unit_eq_mu'` + `show`-uniform + flatten ÔÇö all GREEN), but its residual is the
**same wall**: two `╬╝_X` that print identically but carry **hidden distinct `Localization.fac` proof terms**,
so they are defeq-NOT-token-identical. `rw [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` Ôćĺ pattern-not-found; `slice`/`simp`/`erw`
Ôćĺ isDefEq-timeout. **hK_lhs Step-1b MERGE and the head-cancel are the SAME ╬╝-syntactic-identity wall.**

## Subagent findings (reports in `.archon/logs/iter-015/`)
- **lvbc fbc015** (claimed 1 must-fix / 4 major): the "must-fix" (transitive `\leanok` on
  `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp`) is **DOWNGRADED** ÔÇö review-agent verified firsthand: only a STATEMENT-level
  `\leanok` (L807) exists (legitimately "declaration formalized"); there is **no proof-level `\leanok`**, so
  the marker state is honest, no override needed. Genuine majors landed: prose over-states morphism-purity +
  stale `\uses{globalSectionsIso_hom_comp3_specMap_appTop}` + bridge coverage debt Ôćĺ `% NOTE` added,
  recommendations filed. Report `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-fbc015.md`.
- **lvbc snap015** (0 must-fix / 2): the `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` `% NOTE` caveat **regressed** (removed by
  a prose edit) Ôćĺ **RESTORED** by review agent. Head-helper coverage debt Ôćĺ recommendations. No stale
  `\leanok`. Report `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-snap015.md`.
- **lean-auditor iter015** (0 must-fix / 4 major / 2 minor): standing `maxHeartbeats` misscope on the
  compile-dead mate region (FBC L1499/L1534-1537 ÔÇö defer to mate-excision); stale bridge comment claiming
  "rfl closes the residual" (L753, now false ÔÇö prover-fix); FBC L184-247 parent-project iter-NNN refs;
  `import Mathlib` monolithic; stale SNAP `iter-014 COLD-PROBE` label (L1999). All MEDIUM/LOW, bundle.
  Report `task_results/lean-auditor-iter015.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:gammaPushforwardIso_comp` (proof): added `% NOTE:` ÔÇö morphism route
  succeeded + cold-green; realized tail DOES descend to elements; `\uses{globalSectionsIso_hom_comp3ÔÇŽ}` is
  STALE (ring content absorbed in per-map isos); whole proof transitively gated on the still-`sorry` bridge;
  bridge needs its own blueprint block. (No `\leanok` change ÔÇö statement marker is correct, no proof marker.)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` (proof): RESTORED `% NOTE:` (regressed via a
  prose edit) ÔÇö steps above are INTENDED not realized; `associator_naturality`/`associator_hom_app` NO-MATCH;
  Step-1b interchange is the active WALL; head-cancel residual = same ╬╝-syntactic-identity wall.
- No `\leanok` override applied (sync's verdict honest on both files). No `\mathlibok`, no `\lean{}` rename,
  no stale `\notready`.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Morphism-level + per-map-absorbed ring content beats the junction kernel bomb** (FBC). When the
  ring/coherence content is already baked into single-map isos, the composition law is pure bookkeeping: one
  bridge crossing + an identity-on-carrier tail rfl + `cast_heq`. NO element distribution across the junction.
- **╬╝-syntactic-identity wall** (SNAP): a fully-reduced single `╬╝_X.hom Ôëź ╬╝_X.inv` cancel still fails because
  the two ╬╝'s carry hidden distinct `Localization.fac` proof terms. Neither head-algebra nor more `show`/`erw`
  helps ÔÇö the fix is a token-identical restatement / `Subsingleton.elim` on the witness.
- **LSP-clean vs cold-build-bomb** reconfirmed (FBC bridge): `congr 1`/`rfl` close in LSP, kernel-timeout
  cold. Only `lake build` is authoritative.

## Recommendations (next plan iter) ÔÇö see recommendations.md
FBC: close the bridge (small, scoped ÔÇö `SheafOfModules.Hom.ext` + `pushforwardComp_inv_app_app`); do NOT
trigger the junction-free refactor (the morphism route already defeated the bomb). SNAP: fire the 3rd
analogist on the ╬╝-syntactic-identity (token-identical ╬╝ restatement), NOT another prover retry.
